overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis. The player navigates through commercial districts, covered underpasses, and elevated highways with neon signage and high-rise architecture. Cinematic game engine rendering with dynamic lighting and detailed urban environments characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a futuristic commercial boulevard with towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The vehicle follows a black van toward an intersection, passing under an elevated pedestrian bridge. Orange safety railings line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection district with palm-lined streets

making right turn at intersection with crosswalk

yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right onto a palm-lined street with modern glass office towers. After navigating another intersection, the concrete highway overpass becomes prominent ahead. The neon commercial buildings from the previous street are now visible on the right as the vehicle progresses.

segments.scene_description: Following a teal sports car, the vehicle turns right into a semi-covered area with tall concrete retaining walls. The scene transitions into a darker underpass with graffiti on the walls and a parking garage visible to the left. Natural lighting diminishes as the vehicle enters the covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with covered sections and neon signage

events.description: exiting covered highway section into bright direct sunlight
merging into moderate traffic on multi-lane elevated highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating on elevated highway navigating through moderate traffic

entered.detail: metal safety barriers with horizontal slats along the roadway edge
large purple neon billboard with white text reading TENGU
multi-level highway interchange with concrete ramps and pillars
suspended highway direction signs above the lanes

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered elevated highway section with metal guardrails and concrete walls. The vehicle exits the tunnel into bright sunlight around 30 seconds, revealing a multi-lane highway with moderate traffic. Prominent neon billboards including a large purple TENGU sign appear on the right as the vehicle continues along the elevated roadway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions through a dark underpass before emerging onto a sun-drenched elevated highway. It begins on a futuristic boulevard flanked by towering neon advertisements and orange safety railings, following a black van beneath a pedestrian bridge. As the vehicle turns right, the environment shifts to a palm-lined street of glass office towers before the camera follows a teal sports car into a semi-covered area. The scene then descends into a darker underpass characterized by concrete retaining walls and graffiti, where natural light diminishes and a parking garage appears to the left. Finally, the vehicle exits the tunnel into bright sunlight, opening up onto a multi-lane elevated roadway featuring moderate traffic and prominent purple neon billboards.
